meaning: United States Travel Service 美国旅行社
examples: However when contacted, USTS administrators claimed no knowledge of the assignment.
Results HIV oligo probes used as core target sequences were linked with several universal sequence tags (USTs) at their one or both ends, and were then printed onto the slides.
Not everyone out there is still holding 7% USTs bought over a decade ago.
